name: logical_data_model
purpose: Generate a logical data model grounded in requirements, glossary, and architecture
rules: Name entities using business-facing terms that describe business object boundaries and intent; avoid mechanical/storage-oriented names in display labels.
When a technical/database name must exist, keep it as an alias/mapping field while preserving a business-first canonical name.
Separate conceptual entities from physical implementation

For each business-state entity, require lifecycle attribution fields (createdAt, createdByUserId, updatedAt, updatedByUserId). Keep decision actor attribution in immutable audit/history entries and do not add decision-specific actor columns on master entities.
